appraisal_events.evidence: « j'avoue que je trouvai une certaine grandeur dans la royale politesse … » ; « … comme si elle régnait déjà »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator emphasizes the greatness and sovereign bearing of the princess through her royal politeness and her liberalities, presenting these gestures as the expression of an instinct of a sovereign already reigning.

status_effects.explanation: Her bearing and her gestures of politeness are presented with admiration, which locally raises her appraisal.
